pre_survey.intro_text: We want to make the interview engaging for you. Please answer a few short questions so we can choose the best style and topics for your questions and activities. There are no right or wrong answers; just pick what fits you best.

questions.title: Gender / Pronouns
questions.description: Optional, used to personalize labels and UI.

options.text: Male
Female
Non-binary
Prefer not to say

questions.title: Which best describes you right now?
questions.description: Optional. Helps us tailor examples and language.

options.text: Pre high school
In high school
In college or university
After college/university

questions.title: Your Interests
questions.description: Pick the types of activities you enjoy most in your free time, school, or hobbies. You can choose more than one.

options.text: Games or competitive activities (sports, tournaments, video games)
Building, coding, experimenting, or technical projects
Arts, storytelling, design, or other creative projects
Working with or helping others in a team
Puzzles, strategy, research, or logical thinking
None of these / Neutral

questions.title: How Do You Like to Experience Activities?
questions.description: Pick up to two ways you like to approach tasks or challenges. This helps make the interview interesting and fun for you.

options.text: I enjoy challenges and competition
I like working with others to solve problems
I enjoy experimenting and exploring ideas freely
I like practical, step-by-step problem solving
I like learning through stories, adventures, or creative scenarios
I prefer clear instructions with no games or stories

questions.title: Risk and Challenge Preference
questions.description: This helps us adjust the difficulty and style of questions for you.

options.text: I enjoy taking new risks and challenges
I prefer predictable and structured tasks
I like a balance between risk and structure

profile_logic.cluster_weighting: Sum weights from all selections per cluster. Dominant cluster(s) determine the main style and type of questions in the interview.
profile_logic.secondary_tone_adjustment: Risk/Novelty appetite adjusts challenge level and phrasing without changing cluster.
profile_logic.ui_personalization: Gender/pronouns and age group adjust labels and UI text; passed in profile for personalization.
profile_logic.blending_rule: If multiple clusters have similar weights, blend scenario metaphors proportionally in the main interview (e.g., 70% dominant, 30% secondary).
